products.name: Initial Certification – Full Application & Exam Fee
products.short: Full certification process for first-time applicants, including IC&RC exam at a certified Arizona testing center (Phoenix or Flagstaff).
includes: In-Person Testing at a certified AZ center

products.name: Initial Certification – Full Application & Exam Fee (Remote Proctored Exam)
products.short: Full certification process for first-time applicants with a remote-proctored IC&RC exam option for added flexibility.
includes: Remote-Proctored Exam from a secure approved location

products.name: Certification Certification-Only Fee – Already Passed IC&RC Exam
products.short: For applicants who already passed the IC&RC exam and are ready to complete certification through ABCAC.
includes: Issuance of a 2-year ABCAC credential for any approved level (CAC, CADAC, AADC, CCS, CCJP, CPRS, CPS, etc.)

products.name: Certification Renewal – 2-Year Credential Renewal Fee
products.short: For certified professionals renewing their credential. All ABCAC credentials renew every two years.
includes: Issuance of a new 2-year ABCAC credential for any approved level

products.name: Certification Sync
products.short: Sync all your ABCAC certifications into one unified renewal date for $15/month. Eliminate multiple deadlines and stay compliant.
includes: Ideal for professionals holding multiple credentials

products.name: Testing for Certification with ABCAC and/or Licensure with AZBBHE – In Person
products.short: IC&RC exam registration for individuals pursuing AZBBHE licensure and/or ABCAC certification, in-person.

products.name: Testing for Certification with ABCAC and/or Licensure with AZBBHE – Remote Proctored Exam
products.short: IC&RC exam registration for AZBBHE licensure and/or ABCAC certification, remote-proctored.

products.name: CEU Workshop Endorsement (Up to 8 Contact Hours)
products.short: ABCAC endorsement of a CEU workshop with 8 contact hours or less (shorter / half-day workshops).

products.name: CEU Workshop Endorsement (9–15 Contact Hours)
products.short: ABCAC endorsement of a CEU workshop with more than 8 and up to 15 contact hours (full-day / multi-part).

products.name: CEU Workshop Endorsement (More Than 15 Contact Hours)
products.short: ABCAC endorsement of a CEU workshop exceeding 15 contact hours. Includes full application review.

products.name: Annual Credential Fee – Approved CEU Providers
products.short: Annual credential maintenance fee to remain an approved CEU provider with ABCAC. Due yearly on your anniversary date.
